message:
feat(workflows): add HandleAuthRequired workflow for auth recovery

Implement the HandleAuthRequired workflow (wa-nu4.2.2.4) that detects
authentication events and determines the appropriate recovery strategy:

- workflows.rs (585 new lines): HandleAuthRequired struct implementing
  the Workflow trait with cooldown-based deduplication (AUTH_COOLDOWN_MS
  = 5 minutes). AuthRecoveryStrategy enum with three variants:
  - DeviceCode: extracts code and URL from detection trigger for
    device code auth flows (Codex)
  - ApiKeyError: extracts key name hint for API key misconfiguration
    (Claude Code ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
  - ManualIntervention: fallback for unrecognized auth patterns

  The workflow emits structured auth events via the event bus and logs
  the recovery strategy. Includes comprehensive test coverage: strategy
  classification from various trigger shapes, cooldown suppression,
  device code extraction, API key hint extraction, and edge cases.

- patterns.rs: wire Codex device_code pattern and Claude Code api_key
  error pattern to trigger "handle_auth_required" workflow instead of
  None.

- main.rs: register HandleAuthRequired in the watcher's workflow runner
  alongside the existing three workflows.

This enables automated auth recovery coordination — when an agent hits
an auth wall, the watcher can detect it and surface the recovery action
to the operator or attempt automated remediation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -747,7 +747,7 @@ fn builtin_codex_pack() -> PatternPack {
                 regex: Some(r"(?P<code>[A-Z0-9]{4}-[A-Z0-9]{5})".to_string()),
                 description: "Codex device authentication code prompt".to_string(),
                 remediation: Some("User needs to enter the code in browser".to_string()),
-                workflow: None,
+                workflow: Some("handle_auth_required".to_string()),
                 manual_fix: None,
                 preview_command: None,
                 learn_more_url: None,
@@ -867,7 +867,7 @@ fn builtin_claude_code_pack() -> PatternPack {
                 regex: None,
                 description: "Claude Code API key authentication error".to_string(),
                 remediation: Some("Check ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable".to_string()),
-                workflow: None,
+                workflow: Some("handle_auth_required".to_string()),
                 manual_fix: None,
                 preview_command: None,
                 learn_more_url: None,
